title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into and Sign in a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with Department of Health - Center for Health Development - Calabarzon for the Receipt of Grant Incentive Intended for Lgu?s Which Had Outstanding Performance During the Bayanihan Bakunahan (NATIONAL VACCINATION DAY) for the Prevention and Control of Covid-19.
